description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI macOS that runs on pull requests and pushes to main or tags. Use a macOS job matrix to test with different LLVM versions. Checkout the repository with submodules, fix git config, set build settings, and run a CI task using Ansible. Publish the package to Cloudsmith if the API key is available, move the package, and attach it to the tag if the workflow was triggered by a tag push.
